title: Populate music library with songs and make podcasts accessible

requirements.text: Populate the music library with a collection of songs including track metadata (title, artist, album, duration) and audio file references
acceptanceCriteria: Backend contains multiple Track entries with complete metadata
Music library endpoint returns populated track list
Tracks are playable through the existing music player interface

requirements.text: Add podcast content to the backend including podcast metadata (title, description, host) and episode information (episode titles, descriptions, audio references)
acceptanceCriteria: Backend contains multiple Podcast entries with episodes
Podcasts endpoint returns populated podcast list with episodes
Episodes are playable through the existing podcast player interface

requirements.text: Ensure the music library page displays all added songs in the TrackList component with functional play controls
acceptanceCriteria: Music page shows all tracks from the populated library
Play buttons work for each track
Track metadata displays correctly (title, artist, album)

requirements.text: Ensure the podcasts page displays all added podcasts in a grid layout with expandable episode lists that are playable

quotes: podcast bhi ese logo tk pahucao

acceptanceCriteria: Podcasts page shows all podcasts from the populated backend
Episodes expand and display correctly when clicking on a podcast
Episode play buttons integrate with the audio player
Podcasts are easily accessible and discoverable in the UI

constraints: Use the existing Track and Podcast data structures defined in backend/main.mo
Do not modify the audio player context or music player component
nonGoals: Integration with external music streaming APIs
Audio file hosting or upload functionality
